overview: Jeen Trade ERP is a comprehensive transport logistics management system for Jeen Trade & Exports Pvt Ltd. It handles the full workflow from delivery orders through trip loading/unloading, billing, accounts receivable/payable, diesel management, petty cash, TDS, and financial reporting — all stored in a shared ICP canister for real-time multi-user access.
features: Full trip lifecycle: Delivery Orders → Loading → Unloading → Billing → Receivable/Payable
Automatic entries: cash advances create Petty Cash debits, HSD creates Diesel records, unloading creates Payables, billing creates Receivables
Smart record locking: billed records fully locked, post-unloading key fields locked, auto-entries read-only
Diesel management: slip/bill grouping, bunk reconciliation, bunk payment tracking
TDS management: 3 types (Advance Cash, Vehicle Payment, TDS Receivable) with PAN-wise summaries
Cash & Bank module: Cash Book and Bank Book with auto-entries from payments
Reports with CSV export: Trip, Revenue, Client Billing, Truck Profit, Diesel
User Management: role assignment, activity log, login history
Duplicate prevention: unique Challan No, Pass No, DO Number, one unloading per challan
Role-based access: Admin can edit/delete all; Users can create and view only
